summary: Setup FastAPI backend skeleton, enforced JSON contracts with Pydantic models, created mock orchestration service, and added functional/performance tests.

changes.description: Initialized FastAPI application. Implemented MockOrchestrationService to simulate LLM interaction. Added POST /api/v1/entries, GET /api/v1/entries, and GET /api/v1/insights/current routes.
Defined strict Pydantic models (JournalEntry, InsightModel, Correlation, EntryRequest, ErrorModel, ErrorDetail) based on docs/JSON_CONTRACT.md to prevent hallucination.
Logged the API surface area, schema enforcement logic, LLM config, and integration demands as required by the asymmetric context logging protocol.
Added required backend dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic, instructor, openai, pytest, httpx, pytest-benchmark.
Added functional and performance tests for all endpoints using pytest, FastAPI TestClient, and pytest-benchmark.
Added standard Python exclusions and the virtual environment folder to prevent committing heavy/unnecessary files.
Configured the default Python interpreter to use the project's virtual environment.

infrastructure_demands: Expecting Supabase DB to accept jsonb inserts at supabase-db:5432.
frontend_demands: Frontend must expect exact structures matching docs/JSON_CONTRACT.md from these API endpoints.
